title: [ExportVerilog] Comb ExtractOp assertion "should be handled by isExpressionUnableToInline" failed

features.name: sv_casez_with_bpassign_to_reg_in_alwaysff
features.description: Code should include an sv.case casez statement with sv.bpassign assignments to an sv.reg inside an sv.alwaysff block, where the registered value feeds into a comb.extract operation

features.name: comb_extract_from_comb_xor_result
features.description: Code should include a comb.extract operation applied to the result of a comb.xor operation, where the xor operands include an sv.read_inout from an sv.reg assigned via sv.casez

features.name: disallowLocalVariables_lowering_option
features.description: Code should include a hw.module with circt.loweringOptions attribute set to disallowLocalVariables, containing an sv.alwaysff block with sv.case casez that assigns to sv.reg
